scripts.build: npm run build:assets && uvx --from 'nikola[extras]' nikola build
scripts.dev: npm run build:assets && uvx --from 'nikola[extras]' nikola auto
scripts.dev:drafts: npm run build:assets && uvx --from 'nikola[extras]' nikola auto
scripts.preview: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev public --compatibility-date=2026-04-24
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy public --project-name textosypretextos
